channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: House buying — 67 replies — 268.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
House buying

Open thread • Replies: 67 • Updated: 2026-07-06 09:37 UTC

OP

I have $180k sitting in an S&P500 index fund and every normie I meet says I'm making a mistake by not getting a mortgage ASAP because housing will only get more expensive.

What is the /biz/ philosophy on this advice? I'm a rentoid and currently pay only around $1000 a month.

Early replies (first 3)

62447251
>>62447246
>every normie I meet says
You could buy and then the market severely crashes.
Housing shouldn't be a financial asset but that's corporatism for you.

62447257
>>62447251
Yea i guess but the stock market "could" also crash and i lose everything. That's not really insightful advice.

62447265
Lmao you are a rentoid

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62447776
>>62447752
Correct. America has another 100 years minimum so long as the CIA and Palantir play things right (they will).

62447823
>>62447246
fast forward 20 years:

birth rates collapsed
anti-immigration sentiment at ath
boomers dying en mass
the west continues to go downhill

historically house prices have been tied to income. and now apparently AI is going to take all our jobs, so I guess you should take that into account as well. the only thing keeping house prices high is immigration. locals cannot afford 1 million dollars for a house. most western countries would have a negative growth rate without immigration. house prices don't go up endlessly for no reason. even if I could afford a house, I would not buy one. you are tied down, you have to maintain the house, protect the house, insure it, pay the property taxes, utilities.. pay pay pay pay fucking endless bleeding money

62447843
>>62447823
Waaaaaaaaaaaah im a victim Waaaaaaaaaaaah

62447847
>>62447776
And about 70 of those years will be like brazil/south africa. USA has always been like 80-90% White, without Whites paying and building everything the country ceases to exist.

62447851
>>62447246
housing is going to crash as fuck except for like maybe 10 zip codes, good luck

62447875
>>62447843
what

62447928
They just banned Blackrcok from snatching up properties. The plan seems to be to try to keep it stable until the boomers die then let it drop.

62447930
Way too much silly discussion about purchasing a house as an investment over renting. You purchase a house to be the owner. IE I shoot guns and hunt in my back yard as I am the owner of the property. I could outright pay the entire mortgage but at 3% interest I choose to invest this money instead.

62447973
>>62447847
Look buddy, I'm a white supremacist literal Nazi who is so racist I left the USA and moved to a 100% white part of Eastern Europe - white people ain't all that special. We have a small .001% of brilliant world changing white men and the rest are mid as fuck.

62448058
>>62447246
Of all the stupid pics you could of chosen for your thread you choose that one? What the fuck for? Fucking faggot.

62448220
if youre in the 30+% fed brackets and youre not itemizing a big ass mortgage deduction why even live

62448304
>>62447361
Just know that at any point in time you could be renovicted or kicked out because the landlord (or their family) wants to move in. After they live there for a while, they will increase the rent to the market rate. Then your stuck finding a place at 3x rent.

62448311
>>62447843
>Just shut up and buy my bags, goy

62448426
For $180k you could buy 5 acres of rural land and build at least the envelope of a house and not owe anyone anything.

62448439
>>62447246
do nigresses really goon to this kind of slop? Do they even read?

62448441
>>62448426
$180k would barely get you a livable house in Eastern Europe today.

62448442
>>62447246
>bwwm

>italians
>white

62448454
>>62447823
>fast forward 20 years
wont even take a third of that timeline, 38% of the boomer generation already croaked, look it up if you don't believe me.
We haven't seen much of an impact on the prices yet (well, depends where you live becuz here it already tanked a good 25% from 2022 highs) because it's younger boomies inheriting all the houses from older boomers. And since they are boomers, they know what they got and have enough cash reserves to sit on empty houses for years, waiting for a bounce back who will never come. I know becuz my parents inherited 3 houses the past 5 years and sold only one lol.

62448456
>>62448442
the dude literally is darker than the semi-bleached muttess lol. What is going on in BW heads?

62448596
>>62447246
>because housing will only get more expensive.
Maybe, likely so for big cities that get more job offerings and infinite jeets/immigrants. Rural areas? I am not sure, those might start to drop once boomers die off and zoomers/alphas are too poor and low in numbers and not interested in rural houses.

62448620
>>62448596
Incel rentoids now experts on the housing market, is there anything they dont know?

62448624
>>62448620
I am a proud owner of a commieblock apartment and some fields and forestland that I got from my parents/grandparents.

62448648
>>62448441
Build from scratch be your own contractor

62448659
>>62448624
Thats nice maybe keep out of discussions on America if from commieblock land

62448682
>>62448659
>implying you're in the US
idiot. If we kick the foreigners out you'll be gone first.

62448689
Normies are not getting mortgages because rates are like 6.5% when they would not normally be 3%>.

62448696
>>62448689
Boomers paid 20%

62448701
>>62447286
>2nd house for 425k around 31.
>2nd house is worth 900k now
What happened is their dollars lost half the purchasing power.
BTW they didn't but the house for $425k. They bought it for that plus whatever they pay in interest over time. Which is very likely to be closer to the amount they sold it for later.
It's nice to build equity, but don't be a fool.

62449002
>>62447246
>I have $180k sitting in an S&P500 index fund and every normie I meet says I'm making a mistake by not getting a mortgage ASAP because housing will only get more expensive.
>What is the /biz/ philosophy on this advice? I'm a rentoid and currently pay only around $1000 a month.
I'm in a similar position to you and unless you have a lifestyle reason to need a house it doesn't make financial sense right now IMO. Look at it financially, houses cost probably on the ballpark of 300-350k, let's just assume 325k median in a low to medium cost area, that's a 145k loan, at 6.25% interest rate the annual loss of interest only of 9k on year 1 and 8.9k on year 2 contrasted with an annual net loss currently of 12k a year renting but you also dont have other costs like property taxes, insurance, and maintenance costs that should be baked into rent but are not going to baked into that interest loss of yhe house so add those in too, where i live I'd pay 6k prop tax, 1k insurance, and rule of thumb is to budget 1-3% of home value so 3.25k-9.8k. To build on the case if you have money in the SP500 it has returned 10.5% annually (18.9k) or if you want to play it safe 4.5% in CDs (8.1k). That said, it depends on how long you are looking to buy a house, how risk tolerant you are, and if your landlord wants to increase rents. Run those numbers down a spreadsheet and see what makes sense for you in your area but i have come to the conclusion of letting my money ride in the market for the time being knowing the risk that I could get burned.

62450291
>>62447246
my advice is quit snooping around your mom's secret book collection

item.title: ITT: hard pills for /biz/ to swallow >your main wealth creation engine is your INCOME — 32 replies — 128.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: hard pills for /biz/ to swallow >your main wealth creation engine is your INCOME

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-07-06 09:29 UTC

OP

ITT: hard pills for /biz/ to swallow
>your main wealth creation engine is your INCOME

Early replies (first 3)

62447104
>the most reliable way for you to have gotten wealthy was getting into an ivy league from highschool

62447109
>>62447101
Its actually how much cum you take in...swallow that

62447112
>>62447101
bullshit

there are only so many hours in a day and only so many of those hours that you can work, and only so much money you can get paid for each of those hours

People with an IQ above 110 realize this instinctively. They know working will NEVER make them rich. You have to find a way to get money for other people's work if you want to get wealthy. You need OTHER PEOPLE'S income to get rich.

the only way to do this is to start a business and get money from other people when they buy your stuff and money from other people when they work for you. There's a reason almost every wealthy person owns a business. It's literally the only way for most people to get rich.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62447118
>>62447112
this
/thread

62447122
>>62447112

That counts as income still, I never said it had to be from a job. The point is that having low income and then focusing on trying to invest that low income really well in stocks or crypto or whatever it’s the path to financial success.

62447125
>>62447122

*isn’t that path to financial success

62447126
>>62447112
Your business's income would still be your INCOME would it not? You didn't actually dispute the point that finding ways to increase that is the primary goal...

62447132
>>62447122
>That counts as income still
I see you don't own a business.

all my "income" goes directly back into the business to make more money and so I don't have to pay taxes on it. I then borrow against the value of the business and pay myself just enough to service the loan.

My income is lower than almost anyone else here. I have far more "money" available than 99% of people though. And my "money" is busy making more money.

62447134
>>62447126
>Your business's income would still be your INCOME would it not?
Not according to the IRS or my bank.

>>62447122
I agree with your point regarding investing. Just differ on what counts as income I guess

62447136
You can do everything right and still fail.

62447143
>>62447136
It's normal to fail. Failures outnumber successes by a factor of ten. That's why you learn from your failures and keep trying.

Also success is temporary but I'll let /biz/ learn that bitter pill on their own. You need to succeed not just once, but many times over and over. There is not "Make It." Making it is an ongoing process for most people.

62447417
>>62447101
The best financial decision for a home owner to make is to sell, put everything into stocks and then rent. The gains will more than offset rent and you will get richer faster.

62447424
>>62447417
Loser strategy, you are trading a sure thing for a risky gamble

62447450
>>62447424
The stock market has had a 10% return annually on average for the last 100+ years. It's not exactly gambling. If at any point in history you sold the average home and put the money into stocks you'd make money in the long run. It's never not been true in history.

62447474
>>62447450
>average

Lmao you really are dumb

62447475
>>62447101
The Federal Reserve doesn't print money.

62447634
>>62447112
>almost every wealthy person owns a business
That's not true at all. Most wealthy persons (i.e. liquid net worth > $1m) are school teachers and engineers and accountants and doctors who invested as much of their income as they could manage. Business owners come in a distant 5th. Something like 90% of businesses fail, and of the ones that "succeed" well over 90% just kind of drift along making just enough for the owner to survive.

62447639
>>62447450
Oh to be this young and innocent again. Watch and weep, little one.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Yl3NxTS_DgY

62448879
>>62447634

A lot of the time owning a business is basically just owning a job (self employed).

62448952
>dude just increase your income, lmao

62448967
>>62447134
>Not according to the IRS or my bank.
you might want to read form 1040 a little more closely. hint: it's line 8.

62449006
>>62448952

If you live in a developed country, why not? What’s stopping you?

62449041
>>62447122
>I never said it had to be from a job
>babby pretends to not know the difference between implicit and explicit statements

62449119
>>62447104
This is like saying the most reliable way to get wealthy is to make a successful company. Few can do it.

62449155
>>62449119
that's the point you retard, that was your best chance.

62449166
>>62447101
My income is from flipping meme stocks on leverage

62449297
>>62447475
The Federal Reserve plus large banks and people and businesses borrowing money from the large banks, and the US government, all work together to print money.
It’s purposefully opaque and convoluted so that we don’t understand what’s happening or why, but to say that the Federal Reserve doesn’t print money may be technically accurate but they’re still part of the machinery that allows money creation.

62449336
>>62447634
over 90% of multimillionaires own businesses
>>62448967
idiot

62449411
Can you stop posting this nigger shit

62449481
>>62447634
$1M is not wealthy in the current year.

The millionaire next door trope only gets you 1 to 1.5M. To make real money you need to own a business or get in early to a business with equity compensation.

62449934
>>62447101
>just work for 40 years lmao
slavery will only keep you in slavery
bagging the fries will never get you a house
the regime is incredibly unlikely to improve your cost of living
they will keep printing forever, your boss will not proportionately raise your pay
act smart to stay ahead of the mob
can only be done by accelerating your income velocity
one life, its worth a shot
i hate the antichrist

62450281
>>62447101
What income? I do not have an income.
It cannot be my main wealth creation vehicle

item.title: The only CASP (MICA) licensed firm with a token attached — 44 replies — 52.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
The only CASP (MICA) licensed firm with a token attached

Open thread • Replies: 44 • Updated: 2026-07-06 08:48 UTC

OP

Hey everyone I know it’s been a while since alpha been dropped on biz but here’s some that will change your life by years end. There is only one current MICA license holder with a token and it’s Everest ID. They just got it granted today and it’s still in discovery. This will be the next runner for the RWA/Stablecoin narrative that’s coming once the USA clarity bill is approved. Still a microcap that’s ready to go. If you’re reading this, you’re welcome. The founder is deeply involved with tokeny/apex spearheading the ERC-3643 rwa tokenization standard

https://everestdotorg.medium.com/everest-granted-mica-licence-9f5672301060

Early replies (first 3)

62437251
>>62437175
>MICA license holder with a token
owow it's fucking nothing

62437273
>>62437251
Can’t see the Forest. How sad

62437736
>>62437175
intradasting

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62441690
>>62441674
Hmmm which one to buy

62442240
>>62441637
That stats is from March 2025 though. If the project was actually growing, they'd make new post every other month.

62442258
>>62441690
I would rather stick with xerpies, it have publicly available info of industry adoption, more liquidity, and more holders & real users. Everest look like a moonshot but purely from speculative trading, but them being compliance bound entity means that shilling the ID token will not be on the table. Putting a few hundred here wouldn't hurt much, just don't lock it for staking and don't be a retard that took loan to buy ID and then get liquidated (yes some retard did this before).

62442394
>>62442240
“As a licensed entity operating under applicable EU regulatory standards, my communications today look very different than they might have in the early days of crypto. The flip, crypto-bro tone of yesteryear has no place here. Quite the contrary — all communications, including this one, are reviewed and vetted internally for regulatory compliance. It’s a change I welcome, and one that reflects the seriousness of the environment we operate in.“

62444359
>>62437175
Already in profit. Thank you

62445322
>>62437175
Ripple already solved the RWA + token and is recognized by more people who speculate since they started much earlier. Everest is so underground and cannot freely attract speculators now thanks to MICA. So even if we talk strictly in a gambling scenario, the odds are not in Everest's favor. In fact there's not enough fools to participate in modern crypto.

62445336
>>62437906
Greetings, Ivan

62445632
Chainlink tonight killed himself because of this token.

62445663
>>62445632
The long bear for this token was part of the ritual. He should have held and waited

62446003
>>62437175
Direct banking rails coming online. Tick tock anons the price will not stop rising with the news that will be coming all through 2026

62447324
>>62437175
again this scam, DO NOT BUY THE WILL DUMP SOON, it happens everytime they make a thread about it here

62447343
>>62437175
Ok dude so I looked a bit at this shit dead token and to my surprise this is only traded on Uniswap according to CMC so my conclusion is to never touch this shit ever and keep going DCA on HYPE

Hyperliquid

62447383
>>62441690
never happening :DDDDDDDDDD

62447523
>>62447383
No longer a scam. As confirmed by European regulators. Scams don’t get that license. They have spent 200k to get that license over two year and need to have to maintain 150k in capital permanently. Regulators would not give them the license without future proof of revenue and profitability too

62447539
>>62447523
corruption

62447578
>>62447539
Binance tried to get a license from one of the most corrupt of countries in the eu (Greece) handing out licenses and they couldn’t make the cut. If they couldn’t pay their way nobody can

62447586
>>62437906
Kek it’s a sad reality of life that even the best place on earth has some losers who will not make it.

62447589
>>62438310
T. I can’t have sex with white women

62447594
>>62447586
The eu is definitely the worst place in the world except the uk Canada and Australia

62447598
>>62447586
The EU is actively ethnociding the native population of europe things only went down hill since the inception of the EU and euro they need to go

62447603
go to more shark tanks begging for 100K grants Bob

hilarious how these threads pop up only after any sort of limp pump happens every 6 months or so before inevitably going to a new all time low, friendly reminder that the 24h volume of this deadcoin was basically ZERO last month

62447605
>>62447603
everytime

62447610
>>62447603
Malta asked him to do that for clout later down the line so they can tout him as Malta’s golden boy when Everest’s infrastructure is used to spearhead RWA’s and seamless stablecoin rails. 100k is nothing. They just spent hundreds of thousands to get that MICA license. Look into Apex and ERC 3643 :)

62447613
>>62447598
T. Retarded enough to get brainwashed by russian propaganda

62447638
>>62447613
Ah yes Offcourse its the russians not the reality you see on the street everyday and documented official policy is also russian propoganda

62447885
>>62447638
What documented official policy?

62449346
>>62437175
Another 10 grand buy. Smart money buying in lads

62449372
>>62437175
This was a past cycle rug pull

62449398
>>62449372
Scams don’t get a MICA License :). Only 20% of the 1,200 who applied got it

62450241
>>62449346
bro if everything was true this shitcoin would be already waaaaaaaaaay up, just stop

item.title: BEARISH ON COSTCO — 25 replies — 49.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
BEARISH ON COSTCO

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-07-06 09:08 UTC

OP

People are scamming costcos lenient return policy now. Should we short COST?

Video:
https://x.com/Basedgoymemes/status/2073860759269077199

Early replies (first 3)

62449396
based

62449400
I wouldn't call jeets 'people'

62449441
Fuck this racist, post the person who started to do this was some white bitch, she did it for 12 years

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449480
Just, and I mean actually pause what you’re doing and imagine for a second, ponder the aroma

62449495
>>62449388
costco need to cancel their membership and just ban them

62449515
>>62449441
+1200 izzat for you my friend, to claim please get google gift card and give me code. Do not redeem.

62449517
>>62449400
Based

62449539
>>62449441
Saaaaars

62449616
These are the niggas trying to shill you GRRR stock in /smg

62449623
>>62449539
Will white incels ever fight back or do they like the humiliation of giving away their country?

62449626
>>62449388
I'll post the same reply that I posted in your other thread on the exact same topic:
>>>/pol/538424408
>The sad thing is that a lot of people have done this, not just the poos. It's almost routine to see someone bringing back a totally worn-out backyard playset that has clearly spent years being torn up by their kids, or furniture that fell apart after years of use. The one thing that isn't really an abuse although it seems like it is when people bring back dead plants from their landscaping, because failure for the plant to take root and grow is considered a valid reason for return.

62449694
Jugaaad

62449716
>>62449441
>>62449623
Brown scammers like you need to go back to POOdia.

62449769
>>62449716
Make me

62449770
i would take my old furniture to costco for no other purpose than creating a physical obstacle for boomers trying to shop

62449829
>>62449441
Bloody brown bitch yes

62449846
>>62449769

62449850
>>62449770
But you dont. Why? are you lazy or a coward or just a blowhard incel?

62449862
>>62449388
Izzat status?

62449895
>>62449850
I'm a lazy coward blowhard incel but at least I'm making decent money from my investments.

62450126
>>62449846
kek

62450247
SAAAAAAARS

62450251
>>62449388
>Buy gold at Costco.
>Return when price gone up.
>Free money

62450253
>>62449388
Wtf is wrong with indians?

62450259
>>62450251
?
You would get the same money that you paid when you bought it you fucking mongoloid.

item.title: THE cuckolds of crypto — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE cuckolds of crypto

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-07-06 09:24 UTC

OP

>2021
$53

>2026
$7

Early replies (first 3)

62447356
yep

62447358
>turkish peeler laughing at anyone
Where's your wife and kids Adem?

62447360
>>62447358
Not Adem

He won btw, cuckolds lost (check the price)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62447380
>>62447360
You fuddies look all the same to me. Mentally ill brownoids.

62450196
>>62447380
you're poor lol

62450229
>>62447360
Using Ronaldo as a reaction image carries a 99% chance you are from a 3rd world country. Good luck with the IBS and coke addiction though.

62450242
>>62450229
>Lyrica (pregabalin) is a prescription medication used to treat nerve pain, epilepsy (seizures), generalized anxiety disorder, and fibromyalgia. It works by calming overactive nerves in the brain and spinal cord.
>Common side effects include dizziness, drowsiness, and weight gain
>generalized anxiety
>weight gain
>IBS
Can't make this shit up. EVERY FUCKING TIME fuddies accidentally leak any perosnal info, it's some extremely embarrassing shit about their disgustingly depressing lives. Another board spamming LINK fuddie added to the rather long list of fat, drug addicted mentally ill losers that latched onto Chainlink to cope with the bleakness of their pathetic existence.

62450257
>>62450229
>>62450242
Addiction and link fudders is truly a combo for the ages.

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62309887#p62310297
>yeah bro way too much, i was addicted to Lyrica back in 2018. I still have a psychological addiction to it (along with cocaine since it goes hand in hand). The withdrawals are horrible but on the bright side they don't last a lot and the tolerance drops quickly. Be careful man!

62450271
>>62450229
fucking hell imagine the life of a fudder. its like that brazilian creep that posts daily about how "young" he looks while he strides in the crumbling streets of the favela where he lives

only to return to the shack, take his gut pills and fud LINK for 6hrs a day kek

62450273
>>62450257
>cocaine addiction
is this 'apeyieldgod' again? are all link fudders literal porn, alcohol and heavy drug addicts?

item.title: I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job. — 21 replies — 17.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job.

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-07-06 08:27 UTC

OP

I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job. I'm not young, 40 next year, and don't have a job history or references. High school graduate.
How fucked am I?

Early replies (first 3)

62449979
I live in California, too.

62449982
What did you do for the last 23 years? Hard to help without more context. Do you have skills?

62449989
>>62449982
Depression and NEET means not in education employment or training.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449998
>>62449989
So you were just playing video games all that time? I would train and sign up for the military or something.

62450000
>>62449998
kys

62450003
>>62449998
Even if I wasn't past enlistment age that's retarded. Jumping straight into military trading would probably kill me.

62450007
>>62450003
It's one of zogbots who recommend military to everyone

62450019
get a haircut, shave your beard, get a nice suit, remember to sleep well for 1-2 weeks before the interview, always smile and say thank you.

62450028
Your best bet is make money online

62450080
>>62450028
Computers cost money I don't have.

62450086
>>62450080
How are you getting food and other expenses paid for now?

62450088
>>62450007
It would solve your depression and incelisms

62450098
>>62450086
Magic.
>>62450088
Stop posting.

62450099
>>62450098
I was going to try and help but no, stay poor faggot

62450102
>>62450099
Liar

62450111
It's too late for you OP, you missed your opportunity. AI, robots and immigrants are making labor go to zero. Meaning no more jobs for you.

62450116
If you're in the US travel to mexico, and then from there travel to asia or something, broaden your horizons before some disabled downy recruiter manages to convince you to turn yourself into cannon fodder\fertilizer for shlomo

62450127
This isn't even trolling, you're just a bitter asshole trying to pick on someone to make yourself feel better. You're a loser.

62450160
>>62449961
There are no skill jobs such as security guard, food delivery etc. Try applying to those.

62450206
>>62449961
You'd better hope you're a trans black retarded disabled vet then. Otherwise it's doordash and walmart greeter until you die.

This is the endgame for all NEETs. What did you think what going to happen?

62450220
>>62450206
It's OK you'll lose everything soon like most north cuckmericans and you'll both be equal (broke), except you spent all your time on a hamster wheel

item.title: >Data Streams free tier winding down >Free tiers for Data Streams are winding down, with access terminating on September… — 31 replies — 8.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
>Data Streams free tier winding down >Free tiers for Data Streams are winding down, with access terminating on September…

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-07-06 06:03 UTC

OP

>Data Streams free tier winding down
>Free tiers for Data Streams are winding down, with access terminating on September 1st, 2026.
>During this transition, rate limits may become stricter to avoid system congestion. We are encouraging the heavy users of the service to switch to a paid >subscription as soon as possible to avoid disruption. Visit the Self Service centre to get started.

You were told "pay in any currency you like and payment abstraction will automatically convert it to link".
But then they made it just a Stripe subscription that just pays USD straight into Chainlink Labs bank account, completely bypassing any "payment abstraction".

>BUT THEY'LL BUY LINK FOR THE RESERVE WITH THAT MONEY
No they won't - they're currently unlocking around 18 MILLION tokens per quarter. of that 18 million they sell around 15 million and put 3 million into their "reserve"
They don't actually "buy back" the tokens that go into the reserve


They promised 'staking' which turned out to be limited to 45 million tokens.
Then implied "we'll release staking v1 so everyone can stake" then completely backtracked on it.

They promised "everyone will pay for data feeds in link, or any payment will be converted to link"
Then it turned to be "actually we only accept Visa or Mastercard via Stripe"

They promised "we are going to buy back LINK for a strategic reserve"
Then it turned out that they were buying them from themselves at a zero cost

Early replies (first 3)

62439206
>>62439178
1k eoy

62439213
token not sneed?

62439216
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62439227
>>62439178
kek fuddie

62439231
Reasons to but some link today:
>you can stake and earn interest
no YOU cannot. pools closed

>link is used to pay for Chainlink services, which creates demand and increases the price
No - VISA, Mastercard and Amex are used to pay for Chainlink services

>The Chainlink Reserve removes supply and makes it more valuable
Chainlink buy the link from themselves at $0 - the entire point of the reserve is for them to sell it later so its basically just "80% sold now, 20% to sell later". How is that remotely bullish

Where's the bull case?
Is everybody really just sitting around hoping for the Greater Fool Theory to play out?

62439254
>>62439231
That's a very cute gpt prompt OP, but umm I think I'll just not sell LOL

62439270
>>62439254
How is it even remotely ChatGPT and which part was incorrect info?

62439323
gimme a P
gimme a C
what's that spell?

PC
r h
i a
c r
e t

62439367
>>62439178
Didn't like how the other thread was going fuddie?

>Link are going to stop subsidising services and charge all users
>This is bad somehow
>They won't use PAL
>No I can't prove that!? Just believe me!

62439379
>>62439367
Go through the payment portal. It literally asks you to set up a stripe payment subscription and only accepts card
payment abstraction has nothing to do with it. Stripe pay straight into the company account and settle daily.
If they want to buy link with the money, sure they can, but payment abstraction isn't needed (and doesn't work with Stripe). they can just spot buy on Binance, the same way they spot sell 18 million like every quarter.

But they won't buy link with that money

62439382
chainlink sucks balls

62439408
>>62439367
>They won't use PAL
>No I can't prove that!? Just believe me

What are you talking about? They never even said they would do that with with the Chainlink fees paid through stripe - only when it's paid through crypto which 99% of organisations will not.

You've just made up a completely bullshit claim by misunderstanding what PAL is for. I said what's actually happening. Now you want me to prove why what you've completely made up isn't true?

62439431
>>62439367
This. Good job chainlink labs, you finally built a proper software as a service which charges customer a flat fee based in USD. They're going to look back on their weird crypto days like millennials view their emo phase and the token holders like that one scene chick who was sort of hot in high school but now is a fat hog that lives in a double wide trailer with her felon boyfriend 20 years older than her and their 2 disgusting kids.

62440754
Now do the same thing for XRP. How is it any different, verbose XRP fag? It's impossible to take you seriously when you cheerlead XRP/Ripple Labs when they have the same setup - just without PAL.

62440824
>>62439178
You can literally spell it out, but jeetlinkers live in another dimension. CLL is surviving and thriving, token holders are just bagoid cuckolds holding a worthless asset.

https://youtu.be/26N4u0ihIT4?t=12

62440909
>>62440754
Rent free baggie

62440987
>>62439178
I am demoralized

62442529
>>62440754
>ctrl+f "ripple"
>ctrl+f "xrp"
> 3 results, only you talking about it
I think you're in the wrong thread

62444324
>>62439178
Most based thread on this board by far. Inarguable facts. BUMP.

62444328
>>62439231
>Pools closed
Due to Sir Gay-AIDS

62447670
>>62439367
Your response, sir?

62448515
>>62439178
companies can pay with stripe but sergey will convert those payments to LINK plus extra fee for paying in non-LINK currency

62448632
>>62439178
What’s this mean??? For the retarded

62448640
>>62439178
I’m so dumb that I don’t know I can’t determine if the OP is good or not. I don’t even know who the fudders and chillers are half the time

>>62439431
Like I don’t know if this guy is saying chainlink is good or bad

62448643
>>62448515
says who, stinkbag?
why would sergey even waste his time doing that? what's the point?

62448710
>>62448643
to make more money
charge companies for convenience
the LINK token secures the node network so you must have the value represented on chain somewhere as the LINK token

62448728
Link is going to 100 eoy 2027, load up now fuddies

62448748
Sergey is a genius and long term visionary. He got everyone in defi hooked on what Chainlink was officering to the point that pretty much all of crypto and DeFi now needs what link is offering. Only AFTER everyone is addicted does he begin charging fees such that they have no other choice. In the meanwhile, his petty "competitors" getting hacked left and right. Fuddies have been mocking link's revenue all the while now are trying to spin this as fud?

62448971
I'm sorry. I won't sell.

62449134
>>62448971
oh i think you will
it's called capitulation
everyone has their pain point :}

62450027
>>62439178
Chainlink Labs don't need to be paid in Link, the contracts/nodes do.
That's why Payment Abstraction exists; because the nodes can only be paid in Link.

You're either really retarded, or just pretending to be.

item.title: XRP/BTC YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED (not financial advice) — 6 replies — 5.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
XRP/BTC YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED (not financial advice)

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-07-06 08:36 UTC

OP

XRP/BTC

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED (not financial advice)

Early replies (first 3)

62445379
>>62445330
Just admit what? You guys are wrong on every single accusation and every single accusation is Alinsky projection. You talk about tokens not being needed etc. You guys don't even understand your own investment thesis and when you have it clarified you throw a fucking FIT that is on par with antinatalist leftists seeing a happy traditional white family have children. You have a resentment based group identity that is REALLY cringily built around a fucking coin specific greed cult. Even when you have it proven before you you deny and deflect and project and throw the most vile and venemous knowingly wrong shit you can imagine with zero integrity or even remotely human treatment, being in the same price as 6 years ago, and being able to pivot and just move and reposition based on what you know to be true. You care less about what is true than you care about just posturing to have your coin be shown to be favorable even knowing your coin is literally just a liquidity extraction channel to be a paypig for a company whose builtout product does not translate back to token value. It is so weird it is almost tought to imagine existing let alone being. I am SO fucking happy to not be you I can't even fucking imagine the Hell it would be...

62445399
>>62445330
Both are f**ked...should've bought LTC

62445502
>>62445379
t. seething linkie

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62447174
>>62445502
100%. He is REALLY mad he has nothing to argue and that everyone who tries gets rekt but can't cope without being loud despite having nothing to say so he copy pastes my old posts from the archives and sometimes inserts random shit projects like fucking BSV shilling into it. Really unimaginable how he thinks this is a meaningful proof against XRP or how it is not extremely obvious admission to himself and everyone that he cannot defend link and is a literal cult devotee committed to messaging games for his findom master over actually making it.

62447178
>>62447174
yeah it's unbelievable

62450228
>>62445330
>>62445502
>>62447174
>>62447178
Are you hoping my writing gets conflated with it because you know its writing is actually unconvincing and a stylistic but mostly insubstantive aim at my writing? Are you hoping to have me be dismissed because you make arguments posing as me because you lost the arguments consistently, without exception on a single point, while being DRAGGED kicking and screaming for fucking months thread after thread every time, and you are STILL THIS obstinate to accepting reality? Do you realize how objectively, INSANELY narcissistic and wilfully delusional/repressed this makes you? I literally cannot even imagine letting myself become this. You are what we described in full evolution. What do you even get out of it if you aren't a paid thirdworld poster (serious question)? Seriously. Like if you realize you are wrong or can't argue the point, what is the win condition? What sphere of benefit are you even aiming at? Do you ever even consider this?
Still the weirdest step in all of the abstract oddness of cope has been to write stilted non-reply attempts at satire that aim to imitate what I say but never really doing so. I didn't even use the taxi analogy here. BUT..In the corpus of your work doing so across many threads, in this specific time of doing so, there were multiple parts that made me laugh genuinely. Lol You did a good job of streching and winding out things that feel like they are never going to close and then closing them in a sound enough way to make the stretching out feel rhetorically justified. The redditor fedora accents of "...reduced to mere sophistry" etc. are a bit heavy handed but speaking to the whole product, genuinely really funny. Your writing has improved dramatically in this one too in the parts you were taking seriously and not just inserting barbs you meant to be deliberately/ cheaply punchy

item.title: Bargaining skill — 5 replies — 1.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bargaining skill

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-07-06 06:42 UTC

OP

How do you get custom videos from women on onlyfans and fansly for the least amount of money when negotiating with them in their dms?

I’m obviously only referring to dealing with young women on OF who are new to the platform and industry and don’t have much followers or money.

In my experience if you just tell them what kind of video you want and then ask how much they charge prices vary wildly from girl to girl even though it is same video request and the girls are similar level of attractiveness, nationality, follower count, etc
But when I name a price like 50 dollars for a 5 minute video sometimes she will say no then I will say lmk if you change your mind and she never does

How do you negotiate?

>SIMP

I agree if you spend a large amount such as more than a few percent of your income on porn you have an issue and I agree that if you are spending significant amounts of money on women who have lots of money and followers then that is a waste.

Early replies (first 3)

62446509
Bump

62449324
>>62446448
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XkNsNKgSvAY

62449339
>>62446448
Anon, love does not praise the works of iniquity. You're aiding the collapse of your own society.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449402
Shop around? Ask several at once, then take the best offer, there's no point haggling for 20% off when the another girl only wants half. You'll never run out of e-thots.

62450095
imagine getting a oneitis for porn from some average thot when porn is basically free, what you are doing is extremely pathetic, being an addict is one thing, being addicted to a person is something else entirely

Misato >>> Rei & Asuka

item.title: There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money Doing small buys into the market… — 56 replies — 54.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money Doing small buys into the market…

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-07-06 08:36 UTC

OP

There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money

Doing small buys into the market in the hope you have a nest egg in your late 60's is retarded as fuck

>inbefore: YoU mUsT bE a ZoOomeR

Im almost 40. I built shit and made millions in 20s and 30s. It was only when I had over $5M liquid did I start putting my money in the markets.

You're all retarded as fuck for investing when you have like 50k to ur name, absolute massive cock fuck shit waste of time, go take that 50k and BUILD SOMETHING that makes you 500k to 5M in the next few years instead of waiting around like a fucking moron waiting 40 years for it to compound there to 500k.... because 500k in 40 years will be fucking piss shit dick nothing, you dumb faggot

bitch

pic related: me everytime i hear people telling people who are FUCKING POOR to put money in the markets "even just a lil bit counts" - NO IT FUCKING DOESNT LOL

Early replies (first 3)

62443219
>>62443208
elite s tier high iq post

62443220
>turning money into more money is bad
Okay zoomer go back to /r/communism

62443224
>I built shit and made millions in 20s and 30s. It was only when I had over $5M liquid did I start putting my money in the markets.
sure you did bro
this is just another vague "go make a business bro and make millions bro" post that is completely useless

The vast majority of people do not have the connections or the disposable cash to do anything but work and invest for decades

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62445589
>>62445527
That would take 100s of years working while begging for constantly wage increases that always get shot down. Less of a hassle to invest.

62445594
>>62443208
trading crypto is unironically the only way to make it if you start small

62445602
>>62443208
I might as well put some money in the markets and get shit in order, it’s not meant to be plan A it’s meant to be a fallback plan if nothing else goes well.

>dude just build something worth millions
Easier said than done

62445625
>I built some bullshit SaaS company during a time of 0% interest rates and before the commoditization of all software with AI and you can too!
Fuck off millennial. You're just a boomer but 1000 times gayer

62445658
>>62445625
>I will put my $500 per month in the stock market and will have $5M in 50 years
>I'll finally be able to afford a 1 bedroom studio in the hood im gonna be the most chad 75 year old

62445661
Don't listen to boastful idiots. Just work hard and protect your money with your life.

62445664
>>62443208
Putting shit into the shit and piss 500 is still better than saving up. So wtf you talking about?

62445671
>>62443248
Or you could go to viewpoint214.com

62445728
>>62444037
But for it to compound you have to have a large volume of shares. And the average stock is too expensive to have a nominal amount to accumulate the compound effect...

Also the average stocks gains aren't typically that sizable. And tend to be volatile, so the other option is to invest in mutual funds and etfs. But those are extremely expensive and cost too much to start.

62445843
>just make 5 million dollars, simple

meanwhile 97% of millionaires come from either generational wealth, or slow steady contributions and compounding. The number of new millionaires from just housing equity holding 5 or 10 years is millions.

it's true that on a typical budget you'll never make a billion dollars. it's also true you can easily retire a multi millionaire in today's dollars for the price of a daily coffee habit.

if you want to be fit do what fit people do, eat clean and workout. if you want to be rich, do what rich people do, buy stocks and real estate. everyone wants a magic easy button, there isn't one, just buy a lotto ticket or your favorite shitmeme.

62445846
>>62445728
>But for it to compound you have to have a large volume of shares.
Nope. It will still compound at the same rate even with 1 share, as long as your fund supports fractional shares for DRIP.
>invest in mutual funds and etfs.
This is a very good idea for diversification, but does not matter for compounding.
>But those are extremely expensive
Only if you buy the ones that are expensive. While Vanguard's VOO is $684/share, Schwab's SWPPX is only $19. Both track the S&P 500 index. Vanguard supports fractional shares for DRIP. Schwab's SWPPX is cheap because Schwab doesn't like its funds to have a high purchase price so they do stock splits whenever the price gets too high (SWPPX recently had a 6:1 split), and it also has fractional shares for DRIP. Schwab's SCHG (large-cap growth ETF) is only $34/share (recently had a 4:1 stock split).

62445852
>>62445728
lack of a 7th grade math education, checks out. exponential is exponential, regardless of the base number.

exactly how does does say 10 compound slower than 1000? no you won't live off your dividends of 10 shares (or 1000) but they both compound at the same percent rate. thats why its more important to start today and be consistent than what start today means as a dollar figure.

62446567
>>62445846
That's not even close to true. It sounds believable though. You need a bunch of shares.

If you have ten shares and a fraction of a share that doesn't mean anything.

Unless you're in the s&p, but even then your rate of increase is significantly lower because the factor by which you compound or the whole way the compound effect is supposed to work or be most effective is by VOLUME.

10<100<1000

62446574
>>62445846
So you e got 34 thousand dollars to buy a thousand shares of it. So that if it increases you make a thousand times whatever it goes to. So if it goes to 100 dollars then you would make 66,000 dollars?

62446586
If you didn't have any money at all and wanted to make the best possible investment you could. Viewpoint214.com is still the best solution by far. And it's not even close.

62446799
>>62443208
You don't have any money, you're another
>Build a business
Shill
Fuck off

62446802
>>62443240
Okay retard what's your million dollar business idea.

62446804
>>62443248
>>in which case you are playing the market casino and can beat the casino
You don't need to "beat" the "casino" you fucking retard, you just need the market to not crash.

62447963
>>62443208
>put money in the markets "even just a lil bit counts"

the people that need to hear that are goycattle anyway and for them it would help. Sure they might not utilize even a few 100k but its the mentality that counts for the next generation, even if its a minority of people, its still wealth creation that would otherwise never happened. So given that if a goycattle baseline is to consume, pivoting from that is just good.

62448011
>>62443208
The whole idea that you need a hoard of money and that hoarding money is good is retarded anyways.

money is only good in circulation.

62448023
>>62443208
>Justd... Built something.
Didn't think of that. Thanks.

62448828
>>62443208
>There is no point investing in the stock market if you dont already have a lot of money

real

>go take that 50k and BUILD SOMETHING

build what you fucking nigger?

62448835
>>62448828
A business dumbass

62449473
>>62443227
You say this knowing full well that crony capitalism is the issue, not capitalism itself

62449567
>>62449473
Neither are a problem just excuses by dysgenic losers

62449871
>>62446567
If you invest $1000 and the stock price moves 5%, you are 5% richer regardless of whether you bought 1 $1000 share, ten $100 shares, or 100 $10 shares.

Although if you had bought the 100 shares, you could sell option contracts on it for extra money.

62449885
>>62449871
>sell puts
>stonk crashes and you are now bagholding
>sell calls
>stonk moons and you are now left with peanuts

62449911
>>62449885
Yep, why do brain dead poors think they can beat smart people?

62449972
>>62445728
Mutual funds and ETFs are always cheaper than buying into every stock yourself lol, what are you talking about? That's the entire point of them.

62450227
>>62448835
you don't even know yourself what business to build. Truth is, everything has already been built and even if there was a secret sauce, it wouldn't be shared here.

>MUH PRESSURE WASHER BUSINESS

Fucking nigger, kill yourself

item.title: /SMG/ — 345 replies — 35.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
/SMG/

Open thread • Replies: 345 • Updated: 2026-07-05 23:53 UTC

OP

1 more day wagies.

>Educational sites:
https://www.investopedia.com

>Financial TV Streams:
https://www.newslive.com/american/cnbc.html
https://www.livestreamy.net/bloomberg/

>Charts:
https://www.tradingview.com
https://www.finscreener.com
https://www.portfoliovisualizer.com

>Screeners:
https://finviz.com/
https://etfdb.com/

>Gambling:
https://www.optionsplaybook.com/options-introduction/
https://www.optionsprofitcalculator.com
https://optionstrat.com/
https://www.optionistics.com/quotes/option-prices

>Pre-Market and Live data:
https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures
https://finance.yahoo.com/

>Calendars:
https://www.marketwatch.com/economy-politics/calendar
https://www.earningswhispers.com/calendar
https://www.cmegroup.com/trading/interest-rates/countdown-to-fomc.html

https://www.financialjuice.com/home
https://finance.yahoo.com/trending-tickers
https://market24hclock.com/
https://www.dividendchannel.com/drip-returns-calculator
https://brokerchooser.com/
https://www.chathamfinancial.com/technology/us-market-rates

Anyway I'm just going to do roids and get huge and fight in underground arenas and crush your head with my muscular ass retard.

62448720

62448722

62448724

62448727

62448732

62448735

62448758

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 203 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 203 • Updated: 2026-07-06 01:10 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

62428130
>>62425890
emperorBTC's telegram has a basic bitch tldr set of material to learn from. also has a youtube where he goes over stuff. that's where I started and I like that he focuses on the absolute basics, although he leans heavily towards confirmation w/ volume which others may disagree with. btc focused but btc/crypto is perhaps the most effective use of TA.
basically there's no need to get fancy and the chart is the final source of truth because what the price does > what people cope and/or seethe about
support/resistance levels and price action with risk management (defined r:r) = compound as you get gud
once you commit you'll realize "the catch" on people actually make money from trading is is simply how retarded the overwhelming majority of people are that they simply cannot manage a few simple tenets to click buttons and make money, you likely being one of them if you don't develop a process and risk too much on trades
gl anon

62428141
>>62428130
also perps have exploded so trading equities for crypto natives has been a pleasure to avoid tradfi gatekeeping bs
follow the right people on twatter with alerts set to on and it's like having multiple research firms giving alpha for free-- key word "right" accounts. hopefully you have the pattern recognition to figure out which are spewing paid channel larps and which are providing genuine insight
that's basically the whole game. if you can get into a group chat with other chads that's even better because a network is stronger than you alone, although this is def an arena where it ultimately comes down to you mastering yourself (you can't copy trade your way to wealth but you can learn what others do/how they enter/exit positions)
legend trade is a new perps platform that's gamifying this if you wanna start there instead of hyperliquid (front-end using hyperliquid)
Also bigtrout300 on twitter and join his tg as well he's pretty dope. There's a lot of great accounts posting good shit right now. Some really good posters fade in/out of cycles while the scammers/extractors are always abundant, but just use discretion

62428170
>pic related
>"...focus on the chart as these information is very likely to be priced in already"
the "TA is astrology for men" line is used to make fun of retards who take it too far and treat it like divination when in reality it's all stacking probabilities/confluence in your favor as best you can, and from the above example you can see relying on your feed for information will almost always be slower than the chart

62428488
Finally some good posts

62428503
>>62428141
Big trout doesn't post on Twitter and his TG hasn't had activity since May. Any other suggestions?

62428780
>>62428503
His tg is BigTroutTrade and he posts on twitter all the time wdym

62428797
>>62428780
BigTrout Trading on youtube as well

other X goats that have been killing it IMO recently:
@MoneyPrinter0x
and my personal favorite currently:
@Wild_Randomness

there's tons of alpha just follow those people, then see what they repost, then follow the people they interact with that provide research, and even or especially follow the chinese/korean/japanese accounts that post comprehensive semiconductor/other market effort posts since translation is seamless now
never been a better time to go full NEET

62429207
>>62428797
But you're still under $10k?

62429246
>>62378965
Anon Belgium is literally doing very well in the world cup, you should make more of these predictions

62431586
bump.

62431599
probably nothing
bio protocol desci ai BIO now cookin with open ai, nvidia, anthropic, claude news check twita

62432055
>>62373752
Hey
I just started out in this crypto thing and bought $450 worth of solana. How do I become cool and multiply it

62432088
>>62432055
Be like me and listen to people within a group of other retards that are pushing a token. The last one tanked a $200 investment -98% but then he re-deployed the same token and it yielded a 40x from where it was called.

62432306
>>62432088
pardon my incompetence but I didn't understand much of what you just wrote anon

62432350
>>62428797
I had bad experiences following twitter people and waiting for signals even those that seem smart. It can be interesting but you’ll be lost if they randomly stop posting, they’re not funds giving you alpha but people that should have better things to do than post if their full job is actually trading.

I do still like @donalt and @cryptocred their show technical roundup is a rare non clickbaity show that just focuses on TA but most people are inherently frauds on social media

62432360
>>62432055
I don’t think Solana is a good buy right now it’s barely holding support and likely going lower to like 40 if I remember correctly

>>62432088
If you have a group like that be a hero to the community and share it to us

62432373
>>62432360
>be a hero to the community and share it to us
see
>>62385756
I recently held an airdrop for /biz/ too

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62424715

62434369
Bump, I'm getting an early weekend because of the country's birthday. Will devote time to this thread.

62435112
>>62432350
skill issue. donalt? lol
you gotta follow the small accounts anon

62436077
>>62435112
Why would you rely on random accounts calls and not build the skill yourself? You are just fucked if you only listen to others, and you have no way to know they aren’t just lucky for a while until they drag you down with themselves

>donalt
Yes he may be old and washed but you can still learn a lot from two traders that never shilled some memecoin. Except for ftx but I guess everyone had an ftx sponsorship for a while

62436265
>UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD
>200 REPLIES

LMAOOOOOOOOOOOOOO OH NO NO NO NO AAAAAAAHHHHHH

62437580
>>62436077
did you read my first post? i literally said not to just blindly copy trade
there's nothing wrong with using great traders as confluence

62440778
bamp.

62442413
Bump

62443230
Man i wanna move to SLC someday

62444221
>>62443230
Why

62446809
I’m going to college and bc I graduated mitary style I have someone else saving half and half, even if my shortcomings are just too coming for me to live my best life I get to shoot

62446811
>>62446809
I’m also t50

62449394
Bump

item.title: BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan? — 109 replies — 23.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan?

Open thread • Replies: 109 • Updated: 2026-07-06 04:54 UTC

OP

BTC is down again, but are you buying the dip or waiting for lower prices?

>Do you think this is just a normal correction, or is there more downside ahead? What's your strategy?

Early replies (first 3)

62426518
I've been shorting this garbage all month

62426527
>>62426518
Wow, you've got good profit by now then?

62426535
>>62426527
up 80% on some 2x short BTC etf

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62442214
>>62426512
Buy the dip, obviously.

62442227
>>62439167
But that won't help the price up

62442228
>>62442214
Now???

62442255
>>62426512
I dca 60% of my savings each month while saving the remaining 40% for potential lower lows as we approach October, at which point I'll start going in with all of my monthly savings and that 40% I've been holding back.

62442503
>>62442227
Maybe not immediately. But without infrastructure, there's nothing to drive long-term value anyway.

62442507
>>62442214
Yup, little by little.

62442511
>>62442507
>>62442228
I dollar cost. THe past few months have been gr8

62442553
>>62442511
Where do you do that

62442563
>>62426512
I am DCAing in

62442650
>>62442503
memecoins pump faster. I made money on Ansem and some Solana gems

62442655
>>62439758
never trust centralised services

62442658
buy btc goys

62442668
>>62442658
oy vey

62443383
>>62442650
Well, that's good for you.
>>62442655
Same. Self-custody first, then I check if the protocol has had multiple audits.

62443384
>>62442658
Do it man!

62443930
>>62442668
Goy

62444179
I'm waiting for October, but if it goes below 55k I'll probably start slurping. Everyone who says crypto I'd dead is retarded. Not ripping = dead is their logic.

62444587
>>62426537
That's never going to happen, max will be around 45K. My plan is to DCA, I got in around 58K, stake a few on babylon, I'm waiting to see if there will be more dump

62444608
>>62444587
You really trust the Babylon protocol? It's my first time looking into it and I see I could earn 0.02+ BTC every month. $1200+ every month sounds much better than sitting in my Ledger.

62444998
>>62444608
really

62445005
>>62426512
I'm selling at 100k. I've had enough of holding and should have sold last year. I wanna get out of this shit, it's too much stress.

62445018
>>62427357
do not pull

62445689
>>62444998
DYOR

62446816
>>62445018
Who's plebs rn?

62447133
>>62445005
regrets?

62447140
Ngmi

62447522
>>62442255
Just keep going

62448616
>>62426537
this is probably correct : (

trump and the political class already made their money off crypto last couple years

62448797
>>62427359
Surely the bottom would be zero, no?

62449904
>>62448797
people like to imagine when theyre on drugs
